markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content strategy feedback and align on immediate priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy Refined:** The strategy will now target senior personas with advanced topics, prioritize voice AI over chat, and reframe "contact center" content as "customer experience" to broaden appeal.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [**First Blogs Selected:** The first three blogs will be product-focused comparisons (Cresta vs. Nexidia, Cresta vs. Verint, Cresta vs. \[3rd competitor\]) to calibrate messaging early in the sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [**New Looker Dashboard:** A new dashboard unifies GA4 and GSC data for performance tracking. Cresta will get edit access to integrate this data into their internal systems.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)

## Topics

### Content Calendar Feedback

  - [**Target Persona:** Shift from basic topics to advanced content for senior decision-makers.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [**AI Agent Cluster:**](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
      - [**Focus:** Explore use cases, best practices, and human-AI team management.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
      - [**Voice AI:** Increase representation to reflect market momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
      - [**Positioning:** Differentiate Cresta from traditional chatbots.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [**Competitive Cluster:**](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
      - [**Focus:** Target direct AI competitors (e.g., Genesys AI, Nice AI), not general CCaaS platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Cresta integrates with CCaaS platforms, rather than competing directly.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [**Macro Theme:** Reframe "contact center" content as "customer experience" to broaden appeal and target a wider audience.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)

### First Sprint: Blog Selection & Messaging

  - [**Goal:** Use the first blogs to calibrate product messaging early in the sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [**Initial Selection:**](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
      - [Cresta vs. Nexidia](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
      - [Cresta vs. Verint](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
      - [Cresta vs. \[3rd competitor\]](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
  - [**Correction:** The Nextiva comparison was removed.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Nextiva is a UCaaS platform, not a direct competitor.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
      - [**Replacement:** The Verint comparison was selected.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
  - [**Resource:** A product feature matrix (in Notion) will ensure accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
      - [**Maintenance:** Cresta will add comments with links to announcements for new product launches.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)

### Content Deployment & QA

  - [**Placement:** A new "Guides" section will be created under Resources, separate from the main blog, to house all GrowthX content.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
    1.  [GrowthX stages content in Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
    2.  [Cresta reviews and provides feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
    3.  [Cresta publishes the final version.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This process ensures Cresta retains final QA and publishing control.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)

### New Looker Dashboard

  - [**Purpose:** Unify GA4 and GSC data for performance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
  - [**Key Reports:**](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
      - [**GA4 Overview:** Sessions, engagement, landing page performance.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
      - [**Non-Branded:** Traffic from non-branded keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
      - [**Conversions:** Tracks GA4 conversion events.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
      - [**Cohort:** Tracks performance of GrowthX content by cluster and URL.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
      - [**LLM Traffic:** Shows referral traffic from sources like ChatGPT and Perplexity.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will grant Cresta edit access to the dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [**Idea:** Automate alerts for high-intent keywords with low rankings to identify new content opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
      - [Revise content calendar topics based on feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
      - [Write the first three blogs (Nexidia, Verint, \[3rd competitor\]).](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
      - [Share featured image examples from the designer.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
      - [Grant Cresta edit access to the Looker dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
      - [Investigate automating keyword alerts in Looker.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
  - [**Cresta:**](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
      - [Provide feedback on the calibration blog.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
      - [Add new product launch info to the feature matrix.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
      - [Notify GrowthX when the "Guides" section is ready for staging.](https://fathom.video/share/nvrMv_EatoQbpSZ-M4vWfZPKGC1xVfTd?tab=summary&timestamp=1077.0)
